nodes.label: ensemble-logs/ (AI log sink) [secondary]

nodes.label: templates/ design+reference HTML [secondary]
nodes.note: Design mocks + imported/reference HTML the builders mirror. NOT ingested as corpus.

nodes.label: Onboarding pipeline: replicator->palette->onboarder + /generate-template [secondary]
nodes.note: Agentic template pipeline (lives under .claude/, excluded as tooling). Shown only as how it touches the runtime.
